# OpenClaw Mobile

Complete Android application for OpenClaw with all features from OpenClaw Studio.

## Features

- Connect to OpenClaw Gateway
- Agent management (list/create/delete/switch)
- Streaming chat
- Skills management
- Schedules/automations
- All settings controls

## Download APK

[![Build APK](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/openclaw-mobile/actions/workflows/build-apk.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/openclaw-mobile/actions/workflows/build-apk.yml)

1. Go to [Actions](../../actions)
2. Click on the latest workflow run
3. Download the APK artifact

## Build Locally

```bash
cd openclaw-android
./gradlew assembleDebug
```
